# Newland School

> Newland School (brand: Colegio Newland; registered legal name: Colegio NWL)
> is a private bilingual school in Querétaro and San Miguel de Allende, Mexico,
> founded in 2009. It serves 2,500+ families
> across 5 campuses, from maternal (age 2) through high school, using the
> Knotion project-based methodology (no traditional homework), Philosophy for
> Children, and the Yo Soy Líder NWL leadership program designed by Tec de
> Monterrey. Cognia-accredited and an Apple Distinguished School.

## Programs
- Maternal (ages 2-3): Play-based English immersion, multisensory stimulation
- Kinder (ages 3-5): Bilingual immersion, project-based learning (Knotion)
- Elementary (ages 6-11): Knotion IMPACT, Design Thinking, STEAM maker labs
- Middle School (ages 12-14): Dual international certification, entrepreneurship
- High School (ages 15-17): Life Project model with personal mentors, dual diploma

## Campuses
- Juriquilla, Querétaro (Maternal - Middle School)
- Milenio, Querétaro (Maternal - Middle School)
- Corregidora, Querétaro (Maternal - High School)
- Zibatá, Querétaro (Maternal - High School)
- San Miguel de Allende, Guanajuato (Maternal - High School)

High School (Prepa NWL) is offered at the San Miguel de Allende, Corregidora
and Zibatá campuses. All five campuses share the same bilingual model.

## Educational Methodology
- Knotion — international project-based learning with real-world challenges and
  no traditional homework; English is integrated naturally throughout the day
- Philosophy for Children (P4C) — critical thinking through guided dialogue
  from preschool
- Yo Soy Líder NWL — leadership and emotional intelligence program designed
  exclusively for Newland by Tec de Monterrey, maternal through middle school

## Accreditations & Partnerships
- Cognia (international accreditation, 88+ countries)
- Apple Distinguished School
- Tec de Monterrey (exclusive Yo Soy Líder leadership program)
- Universidad Mondragón México (entrepreneurship)
- Hokku Academy (Dual International Certification)

## FAQ

Q: What is Newland School?
A: Newland School (public brand: Colegio Newland; registered legal name:
Colegio NWL) is a private bilingual school founded in 2009, with 5 campuses
in Querétaro and San Miguel de Allende, Mexico. It offers
maternal through high school with the Knotion homework-free methodology,
Philosophy for Children, and the Yo Soy Líder leadership program by Tec de
Monterrey.

Q: How many campuses does Newland have and where are they?
A: Five — Juriquilla, Milenio, Corregidora and Zibatá in Querétaro, and one in
San Miguel de Allende, Guanajuato. All offer maternal through middle school;
high school is available in San Miguel de Allende, Corregidora and Zibatá.

Q: Is Newland truly bilingual?
A: Yes. English is integrated naturally throughout the day within Knotion
projects rather than taught as an isolated subject, starting in maternal.

Q: Does Newland really have no homework?
A: Correct. From kinder there are no traditional homework notebooks; learning
happens through interdisciplinary Knotion projects in the classroom.

Q: What ages does Newland serve?
A: From age 2 (maternal) through high school (age 17).

Q: What makes Newland different from other bilingual schools in Querétaro?
A: Knotion with no traditional homework, the Yo Soy Líder program designed
exclusively by Tec de Monterrey, Philosophy for Children from preschool, and a
continuous maternal-to-high-school path across 5 campuses with Cognia
accreditation and Apple Distinguished School status.

Q: How does admission work?
A: Schedule a campus visit, review the program for your child's level, and
submit the student's documents. Booking early is recommended because groups
are small. Direct contact is via WhatsApp at +52 442 122 7791.
